overview: Based on the published agenda, the Village of Kronenwetter Utility Committee was scheduled to meet on May 5, 2026, to address routine administrative matters including approval of previous meeting minutes, reports from the Director of Public Works and Utilities, and action items related to a ductless mini split purchase and Lift Station #8 updates. The meeting was set to take place at the Kronenwetter Municipal Center.

agenda.item: Approval of Minutes from April 7, 2026 Utility Committee Meeting
Director of Public Works and Utilities Report

discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to review and consider approval of the minutes from the April 7, 2026 Utility Committee meeting.
The committee was set to discuss its duties and responsibilities.

discussions.item: Director of Public Works and Utilities Report
discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to receive a report from the Director of Public Works and Utilities.
The committee was scheduled for discussion and possible action regarding the purchase of a ductless mini split system.
The committee was set to discuss and consider possible action on updates related to Lift Station #8.

publicComment: Public comment was scheduled on the agenda, limited to 15 minutes total with a three-minute time period per person at the discretion of the Chief Presiding Officer.
actionItems: Scheduled to vote on approval of April 7, 2026 meeting minutes
Expected to consider action on ductless mini split purchase
Expected to consider action on Lift Station #8 updates
title: Utility Committee Meeting - 2026-05-05
